description: WSmart-Route algorithm export configuration — maps user-facing acronyms to implementation paths and cleanup metadata.

constructor.description: Route construction algorithms (exact solvers, metaheuristics, learning-based)

selector.description: Mandatory bin-selection policies (decide which bins to collect each day)

improvement.description: Route improvement operators applied after construction

acceptance.description: Acceptance criteria used by metaheuristic search loops

model.description: Neural network model architectures (constructive and improvement)

imitation_policy.description: Neural policy types used with imitation/supervised learning

shared_always.description: Paths retained unconditionally — pure shared utilities and mandatory scaffolding that every export variant needs regardless of algorithm selection.

optional_features.description: Pipeline features that have a dedicated remove_*.py script. Each is KEPT by default unless the caller explicitly drops it via --drop-features.

META_LEARNING.description: Meta-RL and Hierarchical RL (MetaRNN, HRL manager-worker)

SECURITY.description: Symmetric-key cryptography utilities (file encryption, key management)

CALLBACKS.description: Training and simulation callbacks (model summary, display, Reptile, speed monitor)

ENUMS.description: GlobalRegistry enum tags (model_tags, policy_tags, environment_tags, etc.)

UI_LOGIC.description: Logic-layer UI utilities (Streamlit dashboard, dashboard entry point)

DATA_WEB.description: Web-crawling data ingestion (HTML/URL crawlers, OSM downloads)

CLI.description: Parser-based CLI entry point (logic/src/cli/, parser_dispatch.py, file_system.py)

TRACKING.description: Tracking module for logging/visualization (plot_utils, visualize_utils, etc.)

subnet_pruning.description: Controls which model-specific subnet subdirectories are retained. After model selection, prune_codebase.py computes the union of subnet_deps across all kept models and removes the rest.

embeddings._comment: Env-specific embedding files pruned when that env is dropped

HGS_ALNS.description: HGS augmented with Adaptive Large Neighborhood Search

ILS_RVND_SP.description: ILS with RVND and Set Partitioning

POMESIC.description: Partial Optimization Metaheuristic Under Special Intensification Conditions

HMMGD_HH.description: Hidden Markov Model Great Deluge Hyper-Heuristic

CVRP.description: Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem baseline constructor

NDSBRK_GA.description: Non-Dominated Sorting Biased Random-Key Genetic Algorithm

selectors._comment: Mandatory selection policies — strip MS_ prefix for internal_acronym

models._comment: Neural model architectures. subnet_deps lists required decoder/encoder/factory subdirs.

AM.description: Attention Model (Kool et al. 2019) — constructive autoregressive

rl_algorithms._comment: Lightning RL training algorithms in logic/src/pipeline/rl/core/
